title: Local Website Business
detail: A lot of my businesses in my area could use a website for growth and are unaware of how accessible websites are with the use of AI. With my friend, we plan to deliver high quality and secure websites for a reasonable price.

title: Starting a Candle Business
detail: My friend majors in business, and I'm interested in seeing if we can successfully scale a relatively simple yet saturated idea. If we can master simplicity, we can scale to new heights. Because of school, we've only been able to make $100 as of April 2026, but have big plans for the summer.

title: Writing a trilogy based on modern events
detail: I don't want to disclose too much, but I'm deeply interested in writing a trilogy based on recent disturbing modern events and metaphysical concepts. One book will focus on metaphysics and another on a certain type of theory. The third may merge the two themes. I plan to self publish on Kindle.

title: Building an education channel on YouTube
detail: I've met so many people who are devoting great efforts towards making education, specifically STEM education, more accessible. I will match their efforts with my brand new YouTube channel: Dr. Nibbles. As Dr. Nibbles, I plan to deliver both engaging technical education and ways to navigate academics.
